findings.title: SQL Injection in user lookup
findings.description: User-controlled input concatenated directly into SQL query in get_user_by_email().

findings.title: Known RCE in image processing library
findings.description: Remote code execution vulnerability in bundled ImageMagick due to unsanitized file input.

findings.title: Reflected XSS in search page
findings.description: Search query param rendered without escaping in results.html template.

findings.title: Outdated JWT library with signature bypass
findings.description: auth token validation library allows alg=none bypass, affecting session auth.

findings.title: Hardcoded API secret in Dockerfile
findings.description: Payment gateway API secret key hardcoded as ENV in Dockerfile.

findings.title: Verbose error message discloses stack trace
findings.description: Unhandled exception returns full stack trace to client in debug mode.

findings.title: Outdated logging library, no known exploit
findings.description: Minor version behind upstream, changelog shows no security fixes.

findings.title: Missing rate limit on login endpoint
findings.description: Auth login endpoint has no rate limiting, enabling credential-stuffing attacks.
